title: pelargonium × rubefactum
intro: Pelargonium × rubefactum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
